title: Интервью с Гарри Поттером
description: Проиграй по ролям: один ученик — журналист, другой — Гарри Поттер. Реплики появляются на экране по очереди.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Hi, Harry!

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Hi!

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: When do you wake up?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: I wake up in the morning in the Gryffindor tower.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Do you get up quickly after you wake up?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Yes, I do. I get up quickly and put on my cloak.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Do you have breakfast with Ron and Hermione?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Yes, we usually have breakfast together.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: What do you do after breakfast?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: I go to my classes.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Do you study many magic tricks?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Yes, I do. We sometimes study Potions and Transfiguration.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: What do you do in class?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: I listen to the teachers and write in my exercise book.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Do you talk with your friends at break time?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Yes, I do. We often talk with friends and walk in the corridor.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Where do you go after school?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: I sometimes go to the Quidditch pitch.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Do you fly on your broom there?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Yes, I fly on my broom and practice Quidditch.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: What do you do in the afternoon?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: I do my homework in the common room and read books.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: Do you have dinner in the Great Hall in the evening?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: Yes, I have dinner in the Great Hall.

dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: What do you do at night?

dialogue.speaker: harry
dialogue.text: I go back to the Gryffindor tower, go to bed and dream about new adventures.
